Careers
Careers that shape a better future

Whether you’re innovating in the lab, building stronger supply chains, or leading regional customer development teams, Caldic offers you the platform, freedom and support to make a real impact. 

We empower innovation together 


At Caldic, we believe care and opportunity go hand in hand. We’re a global development partner and trusted distributor, creating value at every step of the supply chain alongside our customers and suppliers. Our teams drive innovation in food, biopharma, personal care and industrial formulations across the life science and material science sectors. Whether you work in customer-facing roles, research and development, marketing, operations, finance or HR, you’ll help deliver solutions that improve lives. Join us
